glosses.vi: hiếp dâm; tấn công tình dục

sentences.target: Ils parlent d’un viol aux infos.

translations.fr: Ils parlent d’un viol aux infos.
translations.en: They’re talking about a rape on the news.
translations.es: En las noticias hablan de una violación.
translations.de: In den Nachrichten sprechen sie über eine Vergewaltigung.
translations.it: Al telegiornale parlano di uno stupro.
translations.ko: 뉴스에서 강간 사건에 대해 이야기하고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 新闻里在谈论一起强奸案。
translations.yue: 新聞度講緊一宗強姦案。
translations.pt: Estão a falar de uma violação nas notícias.
translations.vi: Họ đang nói về một vụ hiếp dâm trên bản tin.
translations.ar: يتحدثون في الأخبار عن جريمة اغتصاب.
translations.nl: Op het nieuws praten ze over een verkrachting.
translations.hi: खबरों में एक बलात्कार के बारे में बात हो रही है.
translations.el: Στις ειδήσεις μιλάνε για έναν βιασμό.
translations.nb: De snakker om en voldtekt på nyhetene.
translations.id: Di berita mereka membahas sebuah kasus pemerkosaan.
translations.sv: De pratar om en våldtäkt på nyheterna.
translations.ro: La știri se vorbește despre un viol.
translations.da: De taler om en voldtægt i nyhederne.
translations.ja: ニュースでレイプ事件について話している。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine or mixed); subject of the verb 'parlent'.
Finite main verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; takes a 'de' prepositional complement to mark the topic.
Elided contraction of the preposition 'de' with the indefinite article 'un'; introduces the complement noun phrase.
Common masculine noun; object of the preposition 'de' in 'd’un', head of the complement NP.
Contraction of preposition 'à' with plural article 'les'; introduces an adverbial PP indicating medium/context ('aux infos' ≈ 'on the news').
Common noun (plural); object of the preposition 'à' in 'aux', colloquial for 'the news'.

sentences.target: Je lis un article sur un viol.
sentences.reading: /ʒə li z‿œ̃ aʁtikl syʁ œ̃ vjɔl/

translations.fr: Je lis un article sur un viol.
translations.ipa: /ʒə li z‿œ̃ aʁtikl syʁ œ̃ vjɔl/
translations.en: I’m reading an article about a rape.
translations.es: Estoy leyendo un artículo sobre una violación.
translations.de: Ich lese einen Artikel über eine Vergewaltigung.
translations.it: Sto leggendo un articolo su uno stupro.
translations.ko: 나는 강간 사건에 관한 기사를 읽고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在读一篇关于强奸的文章。
translations.yue: 我喺度睇一篇關於強姦嘅文章。
translations.pt: Estou a ler um artigo sobre uma violação.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đọc một bài viết về vụ hiếp dâm.
translations.nl: Ik lees een artikel over een verkrachting.
translations.hu: Egy cikket olvasok a nemi erőszakról.
translations.hi: मैं बलात्कार पर एक लेख पढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Διαβάζω ένα άρθρο για έναν βιασμό.
translations.nb: Jeg leser en artikkel om en voldtekt.
translations.id: Saya sedang membaca artikel tentang pemerkosaan.
translations.sv: Jag läser en artikel om en våldtäkt.
translations.ro: Citesc un articol despre un viol.
translations.da: Jeg læser en artikel om en voldtægt.
translations.ja: 私はレイプについての記事を読んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'lis'.
Finite main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; takes a direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'article'.
Common masculine noun; direct object (patient) of 'lis'.
Preposition introducing a PP complement that specifies the topic/content of 'article'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'viol'.
Common masculine noun; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: On dénonce un viol dans le quartier.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ denɔ̃s œ̃ vjɔl dɑ̃ lə kaʁtje/

translations.fr: On dénonce un viol dans le quartier.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ denɔ̃s œ̃ vjɔl dɑ̃ lə kaʁtje/
translations.en: Someone reports a rape in the neighborhood.
translations.es: Alguien denuncia una violación en el barrio.
translations.de: Jemand meldet eine Vergewaltigung in der Nachbarschaft.
translations.it: Qualcuno denuncia uno stupro nel quartiere.
translations.zh-Hans: 有人在社区里报了一起强奸案。
translations.yue: 有人喺個社區度報案話有一宗強姦案。
translations.pt: Alguém denuncia uma violação no bairro.
translations.vi: Có người trình báo một vụ hiếp dâm trong khu phố.
translations.ar: أحدهم يبلّغ عن جريمة اغتصاب في الحي.
translations.nl: Iemand meldt een verkrachting in de buurt.
translations.hu: A környéken nemi erőszakról tesznek bejelentést.
translations.hi: मोहल्ले में एक बलात्कार की रिपोर्ट की जा रही है.
translations.el: Κάποιος καταγγέλλει έναν βιασμό στη γειτονιά.
translations.nb: Noen melder om en voldtekt i nabolaget.
translations.id: Seseorang melaporkan pemerkosaan di lingkungan sekitar.
translations.sv: Någon anmäler en våldtäkt i området.
translations.ro: Se raportează un viol în cartier.
translations.da: Nogen anmelder en voldtægt i kvarteret.
translations.ja: 近所でレイプが通報されている。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun ('one'/'we'); triggers 3rd person singular agreement with the verb.
Finite main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive verb selecting a direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'viol'.
Common masculine noun; direct object of 'dénonce'.
Preposition introducing a locative PP.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'quartier'.
Common masculine noun; object of the preposition 'dans', head of the locative PP.

sentences.target: Tu peux signaler un viol ici.

translations.fr: Tu peux signaler un viol ici.
translations.en: You can report a rape here.
translations.de: Hier können Sie eine Vergewaltigung melden.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以在这里报强奸案。
translations.yue: 你可以喺呢度報強姦案。
translations.ru: Здесь вы можете сообщить об изнасиловании.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể trình báo một vụ hiếp dâm tại đây.
translations.ar: يمكنك الإبلاغ عن جريمة اغتصاب هنا.
translations.nl: Je kunt hier een verkrachting melden.
translations.uk: Тут ви можете повідомити про зґвалтування.
translations.hi: आप यहाँ बलात्कार की रिपोर्ट कर सकते हैं.
translations.el: Εδώ μπορείτε να καταγγείλετε έναν βιασμό.
translations.nb: Her kan du anmelde en voldtekt.
translations.id: Anda bisa melaporkan pemerkosaan di sini.
translations.sv: Här kan du anmäla en våldtäkt.
translations.da: Her kan du anmelde en voldtægt.
translations.ja: ここでレイプを通報できます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'peux'.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 2nd person singular; selects an infinitive ('signaler').
Lexical verb in the infinitive; complement of the modal 'peux'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'viol'.
Common masculine noun; direct object of 'signaler'.
Deictic adverb of place; adverbial complement modifying the predicate.
